/home/sgf/ws/luckfox_pangofly/tools/linux/toolchain/arm-rockchip830-linux-uclibcgnueabihf/bin/arm-rockchip830-linux-uclibcgnueabihf-g++  -Wall -Wextra -fPIC CMakeFiles/result_display_node.dir/examples/result_display_node.cc.o -o result_display_node  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sgf/ws/luckfox_pangofly/pangofly/build_luckfox libpangofly.so -lpthread -lrt
